summary:
Androgens and estrogens are specifically noted together in treatment regimens for modifying genital system functions. These combined hormone therapies are officially categorized under standard pharmacotherapeutic classes targeting female reproductive health. 

\boxed{\text{A}}

**Final correct version:**  
Androgens and estrogens are used jointly in approved therapies to modify genital system functioning. Such combinations are formally listed in official drug categorizations related to female reproductive regulation.  

\boxed{\text{A}}
